testcase.name: Методы никогда не должны выбрасывать исключения (Exceptions)
Коэффициент детерминации R^2 должен быть в пределах [0, 1]

failure.message: GeneratorDrivenPropertyCheckFailedException was thrown during property evaluation. (ApproximationProperties.scala:68) Falsified after 3 successful property evaluations. Location: (ApproximationProperties.scala:68) Occurred when passed generated values ( arg0 = List(Point(49.87914904545093, 22.580657258573908), Point(1.512377683411458, -25.47715978548869), Point(13.572555372402626, 31.267563109097978)) // 4 shrinks ) Init Seed: -4977942805564092717

testcase.failure: org.scalatest.exceptions.GeneratorDrivenPropertyCheckFailedException: GeneratorDrivenPropertyCheckFailedException was thrown during property evaluation. (ApproximationProperties.scala:68) Falsified after 3 successful property evaluations. testcase.name: Log и Grade должны отклонять отрицательные X

failure.message: GeneratorDrivenPropertyCheckFailedException was thrown during property evaluation. (ApproximationProperties.scala:79) Falsified after 0 successful property evaluations. Location: (ApproximationProperties.scala:79) Occurred when passed generated values ( arg0 = List() // 4 shrinks ) Init Seed: -2935532280707255448

testcase.name: Кубическая модель должна быть не менее точной, чем квадратичная (на положит. данных)
Методы должны возвращать SingularMatrix, если все X одинаковы

failure.message: GeneratorDrivenPropertyCheckFailedException was thrown during property evaluation. (ApproximationProperties.scala:104) Falsified after 3 successful property evaluations. Location: (ApproximationProperties.scala:104) Occurred when passed generated values ( arg0 = List(Point(9.387034832562811, 1.0), Point(9.387034832562811, 1.0), Point(9.387034832562811, 1.0), Point(9.387034832562811, 1.0), Point(9.387034832562811, 1.0), Point(9.387034832562811, 1.0), Point(9.387034832562811, 1.0), Point(9.387034832562811, 1.0), Point(9.387034832562811, 1.0)) // 1 shrink ) Init Seed: -7164271580933768884
